calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-19-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Larry Lee for Simon Choi (Petitioner).

The Court stated that an Estate for Sherman Choi is already open and that it will not open another one. Mr. Lee stated that they filed the new petition in an abundance of caution because Mr. Choi had not transferred the asset into his name. The petition in the new case number (296229) is off calendar. Status on close of the Estate in the old case number (269039) was set for February 27, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-05-2012 Continued To Dec-19-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
